infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CREW needs camera access to take photos and videos of job sites.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CREW needs photo library access to upload existing photos and videos to projects.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CREW needs microphone access to record videos with audio.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CREW monitors your location while you are clocked in to ensure you remain at the job site. You will receive an alert if you leave the designated work area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: CREW needs background location access to monitor job site attendance while you are clocked in.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CREW needs your location to verify you are at the job site when clocking in and out.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CREW monitors your location while you are clocked in to ensure you remain at the job site. You will receive an alert if you leave the designated work area.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: CREW needs background location access to monitor job site attendance while you are clocked in.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CREW needs your location to verify you are at the job site when clocking in and out.

plugins.photosPermission: CREW needs photo library access to upload existing photos and videos to projects.
plugins.cameraPermission: CREW needs camera access to take photos and videos of job sites.

plugins.faceIDPermission: CREW uses Face ID for quick and secure login.
